en: I've been on my own for long enough, maybe you can show me how to love, maybe you can
ko: 전 계속 전화하려고 했어요, 혼자 너무 오랫동안 있었죠,

en: I'm going through a drought, you don't even have to do too much, you can turn me on with just a touch, baby
ko: 당신은 너무 많은 걸 할 필요 없어요, 그냥 손길 하나로 나를 일으킬 수 있어요,

en: I look around, since it is cold and empty, no one's around to judge me, I can see clearly when you're gone, gone, gone
